emotional_tone: Nostalgic, mysterious, intellectual, analog warmth meeting digital artifacts

textures: Film grain overlay on backgrounds using SVG noise or a semi-transparent noise image.
Scanlines effect on specific 'digital' containers using repeating-linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%) with background-size 100% 4px.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #44403c, often paired with an inner 1px border of #78716c for a skeuomorphic 'panel' feel.
visual_enhancers.effects: Glitch hover effects (text shadow displacement: red/cyan), sepia filters (CSS filter: sepia(80%) hue-rotate(-10deg)) on images that clear on hover.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris Grid) for Gallery and Projects. Asymmetrical, overlapping 'papers on a desk' feel. Use wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-8, p-12, py-24. Containers with borders MUST have p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned for textual content. Avoid perfect symmetry. Elements should feel slightly 'placed by hand' but snapping to a rigid mechanical grid.

buttons.primary: Solid dark background (#1c1917), 1px solid #06b6d4 (cyan), cyan text, sharp corners. Hover: neon cyan box-shadow, text glow, and slight glitch effect.
buttons.secondary: Solid background (#292524), 1px solid #78716c, vintage gold text (#fde047). Hover: border changes to #f59e0b with amber glow.

cards.style: Retro-Futurism (Terminal Look): Background #1c1917, sharp corners (rounded-none), 1px border #44403c. Occasional scanline overlay. Padding p-6 or p-8.
cards.hover: Translate-y-[-2px], border color shifts to #06b6d4, subtle neon shadow.

navigation.style: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-md, bg-stone-950/80, 1px bottom border of #44403c. Monospace links with amber hover states.

inputs.style: Terminal style. bg-stone-900, border-b-2 border-stone-600, no rounded corners, focus:border-cyan-500, focus:outline-none, cyan text cursor.

hero.description: Old-fashioned General computer. Used as main hero background with sepia tone and scanlines overlay.

about.description: A man holding an antique camera. Represents 'Zio Gio' examining the past/future.

gallery_cyber_1.description: Woman in leather jacket with neon lights (cyberpunk contrast).

gallery_cyber_2.description: Vibrant neon lights in a dark setting.

steampunk_machinery.description: Complex network of golden pipes. Useful for backgrounds or blog post thumbnails.

vintage_tech.description: Bunch of old cameras on a glass table. Useful for project gallery.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load fonts from Google Fonts: 'Special Elite', 'Space Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono'.
Use Lucide-react for icons, or install Phosphor if needed.
Implement a global CSS noise overlay (using a pseudo-element on the body) to give the entire site a subtle film grain.

For the Hero section, use the 'Old-fashioned General computer' image with a heavy sepia filter and an overlaid CSS scanline pattern. Text should look like a glowing terminal prompt or typewriter text over the image.

In the Gallery/Projects bento grid, apply a CSS filter `sepia(100%) grayscale(50%)` to the images by default. On hover, remove the filter and add a cyan bounding box with random hex codes (simulating AI facial/object recognition on old photos).

Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Shadcn components can be used for the Contact Form inputs, but they MUST be heavily customized to look like a terminal interface (sharp edges, monospace font, bottom borders instead of full boxes).
Avoid generic 'SaaS' animations. Use Framer Motion to create 'glitch' entrances (quick horizontal shifts, opacity flickers) rather than smooth fades.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
The color palette is restricted: rely on Stone-900/950 for backgrounds, Stone-300 for text. Use Cyan-500 and Amber-500 strictly as 'electric/neon' accents against the analog background.
